SEARCH
Package io.github.senthilganeshs.fj.ds

Interface Tuple<A,B>

Type Parameters:
A - Type of the first element.
B - Type of the second element.
All Known Implementing Classes:
Tuple.TupleImpl
public interface Tuple<A,B>
A purely functional Tuple (Pair) of two values.
